issue_title: FormFieldValidationMessage does not scale well with limited width
issue_body_preview:
When the message wraps multiple lines, the icon gets progressively smaller. Compare it to the `InlineAlert` component which has a very similar visual design:

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/11774799/197219323-313c8702-e11c-421d-a9bf-b3771a104e91.png)
test_description_zh: 在一个宽度受限的容器中渲染 FormFieldValidationMessage 组件，设置较长的验证错误信息使文本自动换行成多行，观察图标的尺寸是否保持不变
expected_result_zh: 无论验证消息文本换行为多少行，FormFieldValidationMessage 左侧的图标应始终保持原始固定大小，不会随容器宽度减小或文本行数增加而缩小
